query:
SELECT 
  DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(createdAt/1000)) as date,
  description,
  COUNT(*) as call_count,
  SUM(ABS(amount)) as total_points
FROM points_transactions
WHERE type = 'spend'
GROUP BY DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(createdAt/1000)), description
ORDER BY date DESC, call_count DESC
LIMIT 50;
